structural_coherence: The header "Webpage: https://safe.engr.tamu.edu/ Biography" is malformed, combining a webpage link and a section title.
The 'Course grading components' section contains text that appears to be a malformed table, lacking proper markdown table formatting.
The 'Grading scale' section contains text that appears to be a malformed table, lacking proper markdown table formatting.
The header "URL for Resource: https://education.wiley.com Notes:" is malformed, combining a URL and a section title.
The 'Course topics' section is presented as a single-column list under a 'Topics' header, which is structurally unusual for a table and could be better formatted as an unordered list.

The 'Course Schedule' section contains text that appears to be a malformed table, lacking proper markdown table formatting. Additionally, rows for 'Exam 1' and 'Exam 2' are missing values in the 'Week' column.

proposals.reasoning: The identified false positives are malformed labels containing URLs and descriptive text that were incorrectly promoted to headers by the parser. The boilerplate header 'Course materials and copyright:' is a common institutional statement found across many syllabi and should be removed entirely. The text cleanup addresses an HTML entity that should be rendered as its character equivalent.
